targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "sensor_reading")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["measurement_type"] == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["site"] == "${site}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["gateway_id"] == "${gateway_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["device_id"] == "${device_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "sensor_reading")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["measurement_type"] == "humidity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["site"] == "${site}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["gateway_id"] == "${gateway_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["device_id"] == "${device_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "sensor_reading")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["measurement_type"] == "pressure")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["site"] == "${site}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["gateway_id"] == "${gateway_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["device_id"] == "${device_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "sensor_reading")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["measurement_type"] == "voltage")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["site"] == "${site}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["gateway_id"] == "${gateway_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["device_id"] == "${device_id}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

list.definition: from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_reading") |> keep(columns: ["site"]) |> distinct(column: "site")
list.name: site
list.query: from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_reading") |> keep(columns: ["site"]) |> distinct(column: "site")
list.label: Site

list.definition: from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_reading") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == "${site}") |> keep(columns: ["gateway_id"]) |> distinct(column: "gateway_id")
list.name: gateway_id
list.query: from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_reading") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.site == "${site}") |> keep(columns: ["gateway_id"]) |> distinct(column: "gateway_id")
list.label: Gateway

list.definition: from(bucket: "telemetry") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_reading") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.gateway_id == "${gateway_id}") |> keep(columns: ["device_id"]) |> distinct(column: "device_id")
